# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.AutoplayFadeInSpeed property

Speed used specifically for fading the volume in when [`AutoplayFadeIn`](./AutoplayFadeIn.md) is active. Separate from [`LerpSpeed`](./LerpSpeed.md) so effect parameters can remain snappier while the audible fade is tuned independently.

```csharp
public float AutoplayFadeInSpeed { get; set; }
```
